result.stdout:
STL Quadric Error Metrics Help:
qem [input_path] [output_path] only STL file format is supported

Optional args:
-q [quality] approximate target number of triangles based on a 0-1 range float. Default is 0.5
-t [trisCount] specific target number of triangles
